# Dc-Music - source inventory
# Generated from feeds table (active + pending). Do not edit manually.
# To add feeds, use pending_feeds.txt in this directory.

# --- Live feeds ---
# 6th & I Historic Synagogue
https://www.sixthandi.org/?ical=1
# Church of the Epiphany Tuesday Concerts
https://epiphanydc.org/events/category/epiphany-tuesday-concert-series/?ical=1
# Sid Gold's Request Room
https://www.sidgolds.com/?ical=1

# --- Scrapers ---
# 9:30 Club
# cmd: python scrapers/songkick.py --url "https://www.songkick.com/venues/922-930-club" --name "9:30 Club"
cities/dc-music/songkick_930club.ics
